message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve modern european food and should be in the north
The restaurant should be in the moderate price range
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves indian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 12:00 on sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to birmingham new street and should leave on monday
The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 20:15
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
